top.title: Oil at $150 will trigger global recession, says boss of financial giant BlackRock
top.summary: Larry Fink says if oil prices stay high for a sustained period it will have "profound implications" for the world economy.

top.title: Iran war shows norms of international conflicts have been overturned
top.summary: US threats against energy infrastructure, and Iran's retaliation on its Gulf neighbours, signal a clear change.

top.title: Pilots killed in LaGuardia plane crash named
top.summary: Investigators released details from the final three minutes of cockpit and tower communications, which showed controllers cleared both the plane and a fire truck to cross the runway.

top.title: Social media bans and digital curfews to be trialled on UK teenagers
top.summary: The government will interview the young people and their parents before and after they try the limits to assess their impact.

top.title: Meta told to pay $375m for misleading users over child safety
top.summary: The owner of Instagram, Facebook and WhatsApp has been found liable by a court in New Mexico.

top.title: Fortnite-maker Epic Games lays off 1,000 more staff
top.summary: It is the second time in recent years the company has announced lays offs due to struggles with its blockbuster online game.

title.#text: The BB-777 is the ultimate in boombox nostalgia
Instagram and Facebook are about to be filled with affiliate content
Meta misled users about its products’ safety, jury decides
